folders.name: 00_WORK

folders.name: 01_WORK_Inbox
folders.summary: 5W2H - WORK -> Every message that arrives, through any channel, lands here as one immutable file. This is the single front door of the memory.

folders.name: 02_WORK_Outbox
folders.summary: 5W2H - WORK -> Every message the organisation sends, through any channel, under human-in-the-loop approval. State = subfolder.
